paper_title: HTLM: Hyper-Text Pre-Training and Prompting of Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: HTLM introduces hyper-text pre-training and prompting by jointly modeling text and HTML structure, enabling structured zero-shot prompting through document-level supervision and size-hinted masking
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 23TB of simplified HTML extracted from Common Crawl
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot prompting, structured generation, auto-prompting, summarization, classification tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving language model performance through structured, document-level supervision and efficient prompting
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: BART-style denoising autoencoding with span masking and size hints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on GLUE, table-to-text generation, classification heads
raw_extraction.extension: Introduces size hints in masking to control generated text length during zero-shot prompting, allowing precise generation of structured outputs with specified token counts
raw_extraction.paper_title: HTLM: Hyper-Text Pre-Training and Prompting of Language Models
